action.reasoning: Observation: Previous iteration found /rab_data with subdirectories asvspoof2021_la (train/dev) and asvspoof2021_la_test (test). Training failed because protocol files not at root of /rab_data. Need to explore subdirectory structure to confirm paths. Analysis: data_dir should be '/rab_data/asvspoof2021_la'. Must verify presence of train_protocol.txt, dev_protocol.txt, flac/ before retraining. Decision: Run ls to confirm data layout, update train.py accordingly, train 2 epochs with frozen XLS-R-300M, submit eval for baseline EER and time measurement.
